Snow Leopard
Health: 100%
Stealth: 50%
Image: /images/backgrounds/start-peak.jpg

The wind howls across the fractured peaks of the Spiti Valley. You are Khangri. Your belly is empty, and the winter snows have driven the blue sheep down to the valleys. You must hunt.

Built by Macallan Butler • HTML, CSS, and JavaScript (Refactored to React)
